findings.statement: Unauthenticated save-run accepts caller-controlled tenant and winner metadata.
Unauthenticated evolution and sandbox routes expose attacker-controlled compute inputs.
Authenticated key holders may request wildcard scopes without visible authority checking.
Bundle path inputs lack visible containment checks and malformed data may propagate exceptions.
Bundle integrity coverage omits several metadata fields and uses float conversions for decimal values.
Sandbox timeout/isolation controls may not terminate or isolate underlying execution.

note: All candidates remain hypotheses because target code execution was prohibited; static patterns are not promoted.
